headline: Dust raises $40M to make AI multiplayer inside the enterprise
summary: Series B round with Abstract and Sequoia to scale its multiplayer AI platform for human-agent collaboration. The company now serves more than 3,000 organizations, with 51,000 monthly active users, zero churn in 2025, and 300,000 agents deployed across the platform. Dust is announcing a $40M Series B with Abstract, Sequoia, Snowflake, and Datadog to build the multiplayer AI system for human-agent collaboration.Most AI at work is still single-player. Everyone gets their own agent, some things get
